title: brassica humilis var. repanda
intro: Brassica humilis var. repanda, also known as wild rocket or rocket lettuce, is a perennial plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its edible leaves and roots. The medicinal properties of Brassica humilis var. repanda include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of consuming this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing essential vitamins and minerals. The herbal preparations of Brassica humilis var. repanda include teas, infusions, and salads made from its leaves, as well as dried roots used in traditional medicine.
